title: 6 jq and sort Commands for Quick JSON Ranking
summary: Rank JSON fields quickly with jq and sort commands for names, durations, timestamps, grouped pairs, and unique owner lists.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with jq and sort

verification_setup: Confirm jq and sort are installed.
Replace the example file name and field paths before running the commands.
Use a JSON file that contains an .items array with numeric and text fields.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/jq_and_sort_commands_for_quick_json_ranking.sh with a real JSON file.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally with a disposable JSON file containing the documented .items array and sortable values. Replace the example file and field paths to match your JSON.
